name: @edge-python/dom-runtime
description: Self-contained DOM capability for Edge Python: dom.wasm carries its own JS bridge, vanilla EdgePython loads it.

scripts.build: cd .. && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --quiet && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/edge_python_dom.wasm runtime/
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
